spec.title: Linux — Node Exporter
spec.description: General-purpose Linux server monitoring (node-exporter). Works for any Linux host; filter by job/instance and ad-hoc labels.

spec.expr: node_load1{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} / on(instance) group_left count by(instance)(node_cpu_seconds_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", mode="idle"})

node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} - node_memory_MemFree_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} - node_memory_Buffers_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} - node_memory_Cached_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}
node_filesystem_size_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", fstype!=""} - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", fstype!=""}

spec.title: CPU pressure
spec.description: PSI; empty if kernel PSI disabled

spec.title: Memory pressure
spec.description: PSI; empty if kernel PSI disabled

spec.title: I/O pressure
spec.description: PSI; empty if kernel PSI disabled
